string.text: Clan Manager Enhanced {VERSION}
Enable Mod
Master toggle. When off, no automated clan management actions will run.
Show Notifications
Display information messages when ClanManagerEnhanced performs daily checks.
Allow Player Clan Parties Join External Armies
If disabled, player clan parties can only stay in the player's own army and will leave non-player armies.
Auto Create Party For Idle Clan Members
Daily check: if a clan member is idle in a town tavern and party slots are available, automatically create a clan party for them.
ClanManagerEnhanced daily check executed.
Found {COUNT} idle clan member(s) in towns.
Blocked {COUNT} player clan party(ies) from staying in a non-player army.
Automatically created {COUNT} clan party(ies) from idle tavern members.
Auto Reinforce Low-Strength Parties
Daily check: extract troops from overgarrisoned castles to reinforce parties below strength threshold.
Party Troop Strength Threshold %
Parties below this percentage of max capacity will seek reinforcement (0-100%).
Castle Overgarrison Threshold %
Castles with garrison above this percentage of max capacity will provide troops (0-100%).
Reinforcement Amount %
Percentage of party max capacity to extract per reinforcement (0-100%, rounded up).
Reinforced party troops with {COUNT} soldiers from castles.
Auto Transfer Excess Prisoners to Dungeons
Daily check: transfer prisoners from overloaded parties to clan castle dungeons.
Party Prisoner Capacity Threshold %
Parties above this percentage of prisoner capacity will transfer excess to dungeons (0-100%).
Transferred {COUNT} prisoners to castle dungeons.
ClanManagerEnhanced failed to initialize Harmony. Check logs.
